hotel_name: Boulders Resort & Spa Scottsdale, Curio Collection by Hilton

reviews.title: Very disappointed.
reviews.text: I booked this "staycation" because it said this was a 5 star location. I also sent a message ahead of my visit requesting a room near the facilities because I am partially disabled and I have a special needs son. They said they would put us near the  pool. Well, we arrived and found out the rooms (Casitas) were scattered throughout the property. We pulled up to register and were immediately stopped by the concierge who told me to exit my vehicle so they could park it. Strange because I pulled up right in front of the check in lobby and could have just parked it myself. I went in and registered. The hostess gave me a map of this and that and they showed me we were not anywhere near the pool. They said we would have to call for a "ride" to the poolband restaurants. I came back out and was told to follow the concierge to a parking area. I complied and followed him and pointed to a spot. I parked and was told to unload my car with our belongings and put them on a golf cart. We then began our treck to our Casita. We passed the registration bldg. and proceeded up and down a trail that WAS NOT ANYWHERE near the pool. We got to our room and realized this was NOT a family friendly place to visit. I asked the driver where there was a place to eat other than the expensive restaurants on property and he said he thought some places were 15 minutes away. I then realized anything we needed we were going to have to ask concierge to pick us up or bring ice to us. This also meant "tips" for everyone. His ride and help cost me $10 and then I went looking for ice and another worker who was passing by said he would get the ice for me. That was another $5 gratuity.

reviews.title: needs updating
reviews.text: The casita was not super clean and needed renovation and repairs. Very tired looking. The nature is gorgeous, but the resort is not worth the price.

reviews.title: 2nd time stay
reviews.text: This is our second time staying at the Boulders.  We highly enjoyed it the first time. This time it was ok.  The facilities/grounds are beautiful.  Spotted Donky is very good to eat at.  We ate their multiple times.   This time we had an adult child come as well and we didn't sleep well as the beds are kind of hard.  Plus, we were put in a location where the delivery trucks pull in and the golf carts are parked at night.  So, at 7 a.m. every morning there was loud beeping as the trucks backed up and the golf carts were backing up.  4 out of 6 nights I woke up to this noise and it was hard to get back to sleep.  My husband pointed it out after his first night of sleep and said he was woken up by it too.  This was something different too we didn't encounter on our first trip:  We were driving in and a security/cop like car approached us after we were onto the grounds about 1/2 way in and passed us.  The community is gated and very safe so we thought that was unusual as we didn't see anything like that on our first stay and it took away from the beauty of the area.  This was a also a strange incident with security as well.  We were leaving with our teenage son during daylight hours and were walking to our SUV in the parking lot.  A golf cart that said 'Security' on the front was following us as we walked into the parking lot and followed us to our SUV in the parking lot.  My husband backed out and the security guard backed up behind us and then got in front of us as we moved forward to go out of the parking lot.  Another young white male security guard stopped on his 'security' golf cart and was talking to the other older white male security guard that had just followed us into the parking lot.  Then as my husband pulled out to leave the parking lot, the older white male security guard that had followed us started up and went through the parking lot across from us quickly and pulled up to the exit of that parking lot quickly right as we went by and then followed us until we left the gated area.  Security guards should not be following guests as they go into parking lots and leave the resort.  My husband is hispanic.  I'm not sure if that caught their attention? or why they were acting in this manner around us during mid day in the resort.  It was unusual is all I can say.  Other than that the grounds are impeccable and the people that take you around on golf carts are very nice.

reviews.title: Great placr
reviews.text: We love the Boulders.  Best value for the money.  Great couples place.  Wonderful golf course.  Rooms show a bit  wear but not bad.  Sliding doors to outside don’t slide well.....all tree years of stats.  Some tiles/rocks in floors ate loose (every visit).  Best to stay on Casita without room above you.  Sometimes a bit noisy.  Great food and service.  Fantastic golf but not good golf carts until they replace them next year.  Bug mistake yo. It carts made in Asia.  Don’t hold up like E-Z Go carts.  Batteries can’t handle the heat. Troon Nirth and

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: They charge me wrong and still didn’t make the refund

reviews.title: Beautiful location
reviews.text:
The Boulders has everything needed to enjoy a vacation. While it is hot in AZ right now the weather is dry so made a round of golf easy to play through—- just needed to stay hydrated 
The staff were friendly and constantly offering to take us to anywhere on the property to avoid the walk. 
We took early a.m. walk in the nature path seeing multiple different species of birds, rabbits and creatures that came out to enjoy cool morning before the sun heated up.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Perfect for a romantic getaway but there were a few families there having a great time as well

reviews.title: The hotel is relaxing and comfortable, but the facilities should be better supervised so that guests have everything the
reviews.positives: quiet and relaxing, staff really friendly
reviews.negatives:
Needs more entertainments , maybe the restaurant more variety of dishes.

My low review is because during my stay, I did not find shampoo to bathe myself, I reported it to the hotel staff, but during my 3-day stay, two days I was without shampoo.

reviews.title: Serenity now
reviews.text: Second time here.  Love the unique setting and sublimely designed facilities that highlight the beautiful environment.  Casita is lovely with a great bed.  Pool area relaxing and quiet during my stays.  Highly recommend for a peaceful desert visit.

reviews.title: Amazing views, helpful staff, room much less than advertised!
reviews.positives: The views were amazing.  The staff was friendly and helpful.  The setting in the boulders is always special.
reviews.negatives:
The room was dated.  The view off our patio was looking down on a roof with 2 old rusty AC units, not great!  Bed was fine but the rest of the furniture was old.  The door had to be busted open with a shoulder in it.  Food prices were exorbitant.  

This is a Curio Brand for Hilton...should be like a JW Marriot brand...not the case with the room quality AT ALL!  Very disappointed with the $$ spent even with a summer rate.

reviews.title: Was kann man nicht am Boulders lieben?
reviews.text: Unserer Meinung nach nichts. Für uns gibt es kaum einen schöneren Ort. Man muss sich darüber im Klaren sein, dass es außerhalb von Phoenix und Scottsdale ist aber wenn man, wie wir, genau das sucht, ist es der Himmel auf Erden. Im Umkreis von wenigen Minuten findet man alles was man braucht und zur Unterhaltung bietet sich außerhalb des Resorts Cave Creek an.

reviews.title: I will never come back!
reviews.positives: I loved the location. It was really nice. Bed was comfortable.
reviews.negatives:
Upon arrival, the front desk girl was not very nice and made us wait for our room. I went outside to tell the shuttle people and they responded with "Another room not ready". The first night we were there, our water was coming out brown from the faucets.  Light bulbs were burned out and needed to be replaced. The hot water in our "Casita" would take a minimum of 20 mins to get slightly hot.  One of the sinks were not draining and the tub drain never worked, even after being fixed.  Luckily someone fixed the lights and the drain at the sink the first night.  The patio furniture was broken and the luggage rack broke after placing luggage on it. I did not like the fact that I had to take a shuttle to get to my car/room every day.  One night after coming home, I sat in the car for 10 mins waiting for a shuttle to come pick me up (Yes, I had gone by and alerted the shuttle people I needed a shuttle to my room).  I ended up walking back to my room because I had picked up dinner and didn't want it to get any colder. Our first morning there, we ordered breakfast with "in room dining". A small Cranberry juice was $7.00 (the whole bill for breakfast with tip was $129.00) Food was $77.00, the rest were all fees. When I asked the manager about the prices and how high they were, she gave me a "It is what it is" type of attitude and said she hardly ate there because of the prices.  I understand the extra charge but that's just price gauging.  After the breakfast debacle, We went other places to eat.  No microwaves in the room, one FIRE log per room.
I am just glad we didn't have the rat problem that a lot of reviews had. Unfortunately, we did not read the reviews about it and would have never stayed here.   I will never go back to The Boulders Resort.  I thought for the "5 star resort" it would have been a better stay.

reviews.title: Love the location and landscape but the overall service was disappointing at best.
reviews.positives: The location is amazing and the layout of the resort was fabulous.  Absolutely loved the views and the landscape.  My phone hot spot was a stronger connection then the Guest WiFi.
reviews.negatives: The property is in need of repair.  We had plumbing issues in our room from day 1.  The room service / guest services is almost non-existent.  We needed an iron as ours was in complete disrepair and wasn't working.  We never received it.  People in our group had dirty rooms etc...  As our unit was not only a bit of a distance from the lodge and from the executive suite we had our meeting at it would have been nice to have the shuttles (golf cart valets) show up on time.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Great location
reviews.negatives: The Spa had deteriorated.  Stopped using it after a completely fake massage

reviews.title: Will not be staying here again. When I travel for business & pay a premium I expect more.
reviews.positives: Room was quite and comfy.
reviews.negatives: Service when trying to obtain vehicle from valet - service was subpar.

reviews.title: food service at spotted donkey and room house keeping was excellent, the spa was very disappointing!
reviews.positives: Breakfast was extremely expensive and chef cannot cook eggs.
reviews.negatives:
Golf carts that are used to transport guest are driven extremely fast by the staff and are not courtesy to other guest walking.

The spa, you’re made to feel unwelcome if you’re not buying a spa service and only using the amenities.
The face towels in the bowl of ice outside the steam room were very stained and dirty looking. The hot tub has a sign that states if the temperature is 104 or higher do not use, but nothing there to tell you the temperature. The railing going into the hot tubs are not centered properly, therefore the steps are uneven, if entering on opposite side of rail. I know because I hurt my shoulder thinking I was stepping down onto the step.
If to remain off center there should be signage where to enter for safety.
The cleanliness was lacking, we arrived at the spa at 2:30 which we were told upon entering they closed at 5pm by several staff members.  At 4:15 I was using the hairdryer and walked away to get something from my bag and within two minutes the locker room attendant was already putting away my hairdryer and I said I was still using that and she said ok and reminded me about the closing time again. The next morning I came back when it first opened at 8:00 a m the first one there and the trash was not emptied in the locker rooms and the toilet I used had poop in it. I’m thinking the locker room was tidy up but not cleaned or disinfected. I felt hurried and was not a relaxing environment.  My opinion the staff should not start to do the final clean until the last customer leaves.
Also only two jets work in the hot tub and it was full of what felt like small gravel in the bottom of the hot tub.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Lovely grounds, walking.
reviews.negatives: Tired rooms. Lots of bugs.

reviews.title: Disappointed
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Parker was great at the front desk. Tim was great with picking us up and answering our questions. Evening cart drivers rude and disrespectful.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: The grounds are beautiful
reviews.negatives: The room wasn’t as clean as I would expect from a 5 star hotel. There were gnats and flys in there. Also very noisy

reviews.title: Unfortunately, We will not be returning this was are 4th stay at The Boulders Resort.
reviews.positives:
Restaurant for breakfast on
Thursday morning was horrible, dead flowers on all the tables. The restaurant manager checked on us
She was wearing a black suit. She had a crop top on with her stomach showing, very unprofessional. Two rude older women one was the hostess and one was our waitress, slow, unfriendly, not attentive to our needs Food was fair for the resort price. Not happy at all!! 
Friday two blonde waitress were excellent, food was much better.
reviews.negatives: We had a golf cart driver that was rude, and drove like a mad man. We both had to hold on every corner was scary. We complained to golf cart attendant and he laughed at us. Golf cart driver was mid age and very muscular quite the attitude. We have decided we will not be returning to this resort. Pool was old and in need of repair. The pool lounges are very uncomfortable not resort style. Wingback chairs in our room very uncomfortable.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: The resort grounds beautiful location!
reviews.negatives: Room service left a lot to be desired. It was an inconvenience to the person taking our order over the phone. It took forever for our food to arrive and when it did arrive it was not what we ordered.

reviews.title: Below average
reviews.positives: For the price I paid the room was way below expectations. Bugs, broken bar sink, no soap in shower.
reviews.negatives: More upscale room for $750 per night. Very rundown room condition.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The location was perfect for us.  The amenities were nice.  The private deck was a great place for a morning cup of coffee.
reviews.negatives: There was a lot of deferred maintenance to the exterior of our casita [stairs, walkway, paint].  We killed quite a few insects in our casita.

reviews.title: It was a nice and relaxing stay, but the handicap room felt awkward
reviews.positives: The property and scenery are aways very nice and relaxing and the service is always top notch.
reviews.negatives: We requested the same room we book every year a this time. However, upon arrival we were informed due to heavy booking they were unable to accommodate us and instead they booked us in a handicap equipped room. It was a nice room but there was no shower or bathroom door to be able to accommodate a wheelchair which was not convenient for us.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The property views were beautiful
reviews.negatives: The rooms are in dire need of a renovation

reviews.title: Beautiful grounds with attentive staff
reviews.negatives:
Lack of food selection and cost was too high for food 
Towels in spa very worn
Robes in room so worn we had to ask for new ones

Some lack of attention to small details

reviews.title: Wonderful location with incredible experiences but food not up to par
reviews.positives: What an amazing property. Gorgeous spacious and the views second to none
reviews.negatives: We tried every restaurant and had issues at most. Menus incorrect, food cold and raw in one case. Food services really needs a shake up   Not a good experience dinning breakfast lunch or dinner. Sent back food 3 times in 4 days

reviews.title: Romantic getaway, everything perfect and enjoyable
reviews.positives: Landscape
reviews.negatives: Coffee and the breakfast dishes (the Benedict sat under the heat lamp long time and sauce dried up. Another time the breakfast enchiladas were not warmed up)

reviews.title: Beautiful magical relaxing location
reviews.positives: Beautiful
reviews.negatives: The only issue I had was that the TV did not work and it took a long time and a couple of phone calls.

reviews.title: Desert Views, peaceful vibes
reviews.positives: We loved how special we felt as soon as we went through the front gate. Staff were extremely friendly and kind. Loved everything about the resort. I'm definitely would stay here again.
reviews.negatives: There wasn't much to not like, but the fact that only one restaurant was open for breakfast, was a little discouraging. Also, same for lunch's not everything was open.

reviews.title: Everyone made us feel very special
reviews.positives: It’s beautiful
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Always a great stay
reviews.positives: Exceptional attention and service by the staff members.
reviews.negatives: Pool menu could use a little update.

reviews.title: I’ll put it this way…what was supposed to be a two night stay, turned into a 4 night stay!!
reviews.positives: I love the views!! The property and villas are beautiful!!

reviews.title: We plan to make it an annual girls trip after having such a wonderful experience!
reviews.positives: The property was beautiful and the surroundings were stunning. It was easy to walk anywhere and no distance longer than 5-10 minutes. The staff was very attentive and our needs were met within minutes of asking. We stayed in a 4 bedroom hacienda and we were very pleased with the size, cleanliness and decor.
reviews.negatives: Nothing, had a great trip!

reviews.title: The best place for beautiful views and great amenities!!
reviews.positives: Loved the casitas and the ease of leaving your car parked the whole time. Never had to wait on a golf cart to pick us up;)

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Four stars.  I’ve stay at several Four Seasons and this is as close as you’re going to get.  We stayed 5 nights 6 days in a 3 bedroom casita with 7 of us and it was perfect.  Staff were friendly and very attentive.  The text ability to request items or ask questions was top notch and responsive.
reviews.negatives: Be prepared to walk or be shuttled around the property.  However, we never waited more than a few minutes for a cart or shuttle.

reviews.title: Incredible accommodation
reviews.positives: Wonderful privacy and decor

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.negatives: No microwave in the room.  Minimal gluten free or dairy free food options available.

reviews.title: Worth the trip and always an excellent stay.
reviews.positives: Great staff and delicious food. The villas view to the desert is beautiful. The wildlife passing on the patio was an added bonus.
reviews.negatives: nothing.

reviews.title: Amazing and relaxing time.
reviews.positives: Restaurant, pool and Hospitality
reviews.negatives: N/A

reviews.title: Coming for years - the comfort and 'relaxed feel' stays the same - a favorite.
reviews.positives:
Pricey for what it was.
$28 for egs and bacon??

reviews.title: Gorgeous property with truly stellar service!
reviews.positives: Truly beautiful property and the staff was amazing and so helfpul and nice, we will definitely be returning.
reviews.negatives: Can't think of a single thing I would change

reviews.title: We had a lovely time!
reviews.positives: Spread out and never felt busy! Loved the option of being picked up and shuttled around the property
reviews.negatives: Aged, could use a little updating/maintenance

reviews.title: The atmosphere at The Boulders was very calming and relaxing, the staff, food and massage was great.
reviews.positives: Couples massage we had at the spa was excellent, we both really enjoyed it and will be returning. The breakfast we had at the Palo Verde restaurant was great, the food was fresh and very tasty, I highly recommend. Also, all staff we came into contact with were very nice and friendly.

reviews.title: Loved it. We will be coming back!
reviews.positives: Beautiful resort. We absolutely loved it and the staff were wonderful. The food was delicious at every restaurant.
reviews.negatives: It’s a little far out from things but it is a minor inconvenience. Bees at the pool were bad one day but it was remedied quickly by the pool staff.

reviews.title: Very nice!
reviews.positives: Wonderful!
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Price

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: All was excellent

reviews.title: Wished we could have stayed longer
reviews.positives: It’s very spacious
reviews.negatives: N/A

reviews.title: A marvelous stay at a beautiful and friendly resort.
reviews.positives: Beautiful facility and grounds! My husband loved the golfing and I enjoyed the Spa. The rooms were clean, spacious and cozy. The room certainly was as pictured!
reviews.negatives: The parking was a little far and at night it is very dark. More lightning around grounds would be better.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Perfect hotel for weekend break - Excellent rooms.

reviews.title: So beautiful!!!
reviews.positives: All the different amenities on site. Beautiful views, very clean. Staff was amazing

reviews.title: Lovely place!
reviews.positives: Great location, beautiful scenery, nice rooms and accommodations
reviews.negatives: I didn’t care to be directly below the person or persons staying in a room above me. The ceiling is very thin and you could hear stomping and banging around very clearly. This was several times during the night and I didn’t get much sleep.

reviews.title: The location is beautiful. The resort is good but it needs updating and better housekeeping.
reviews.positives: All of the dining experiences were wonderful.  Every item was delicious and prepared perfectly.  I requested a Mountain View and I did receive it.  The bell staff was amazing.  The Villa was incredible.
reviews.negatives: The housekeeping was lacking.  Sometimes we were left towels and toiletries. Other times we were left with nothing or they would remove any extras we had. We had to call for toiletries once because they left 1 towel for 3 people and no toiletries. The next day housekeeping took our extra toiletries and left no toilet tissue. Very inconsistent. No vacuuming at all and the patio was dirty upon arrival and never cleaned. And I am being billed for things I shouldn't and communicating with them about it is proving difficult.  5 Stars?  hm

reviews.title: Relaxing in a desert environment
reviews.positives: Gorgeous property, spa, pools, large rooms with sitting areas and fireplace, large bathrooms ( and soap), golf cart shuttle to/from room if needed.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Location, views, cleanliness and food
reviews.negatives: Specific bellmen seemed annoyed when doing their job

reviews.title: Amazing Hospitality
reviews.positives: We appreciated every employee that helped us. Thank you!

reviews.title: Beautiful, relaxing night in the desert.
reviews.positives: Everything!! One of my favorite places on the planet.
reviews.negatives: NA

reviews.title: The staff is exceptional.
reviews.positives: Everything.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: I used this stay as a weekend staycation. The location was amazing and I really enjoyed the scenery, solitude and the ambiance. I would recommend this place to anyone local looking for a quick weekend getaway.

reviews.title: Amazing Gem in the desert
reviews.positives: Boulders resort did not disappoint ! Room was private and close to everything we needed. Fantastic stay

reviews.title: We had a wonderful stay and will be back.
reviews.positives: The property was absolutely gorgeous, the landscaping, building and of course the boulders.
reviews.negatives: Nothing, we loved it all.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: beautiful grounds and room.. enjoyed the pool and restaurants
